gameTitle: God of War: Ghost of Sparta

achievements.title: Devil and the Deep Blue
achievements.description: Fight off Scylla and gain passage to the city of Atlantis
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: What Have I Done?!
achievements.description: Defeat Callisto and acquire the Eye of Atlantis
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Thera-peutic Release
achievements.description: Acquire Thera's Bane after freeing the Titan from her volcanic prison
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: You're Screwed!
achievements.description: Defeat Scylla and set Atlantis on the path to destruction
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Shattered Faith
achievements.description: Reach the Temple of Athena as fire and ash consume the land
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Spartan's Ascent
achievements.description: Reach the Mounts of Aroania and press onward to your homeland
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Toga? Never Heard of Her!
achievements.description: Defeat Erinys and seize the Scourge of Erinys
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Now for the Mane Event!
achievements.description: Defeat the Piraeus Lion and bring swift retribution upon the Dissenter
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Shadow of the Ghost
achievements.description: Defeat the phantom of your past and claim the Skull of Keres
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Scarlet Steel and Northern Winds
achievements.description: Acquire the Arms of Sparta and the Horn of Boreas
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Have You Tried Punching It?
achievements.description: Succumb to temptation upon witnessing the Golden Chest
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Silence Is Golden
achievements.description: Grant King Midas his final wish and end his suffering
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: At World's End
achievements.description: Survive the Vortex and descend into the sunken ruins of Atlantis
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Lightbulb Moment
achievements.description: Defeat the Automaton and seize its Gear after slaying Lanaeus
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: One Foot in the Grave
achievements.description: Reach the Domain of Death, where vengeance is bound by blood
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: The Ghost and the Fury
achievements.description: Fight Deimos and withstand his unrelenting assault
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: The Marked Warrior
achievements.description: Beat the game and bury the final remnants of your past
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Shaped by War
achievements.description: Upgrade any Weapon for the first time
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Gorgon's Favor
achievements.description: Upgrade your Health Meter for the first time
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Phoenix's Blessing
achievements.description: Upgrade your Magic Meter for the first time
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Minotaur's Gift
achievements.description: Upgrade your Fire Meter for the first time
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Unbreakable Will
achievements.description: Collect all Gorgon Eyes
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Eternal Incantations
achievements.description: Collect all Phoenix Feathers
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Labyrinthine Inferno
achievements.description: Collect all Minotaur Horns
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Spartan War Machine
achievements.description: Upgrade all your Weapons and Magic to their max level
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: When in Sparta...
achievements.description: Indulge in the pleasures of Sparta three times
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: What's Yours Is Mine
achievements.description: Collect all Godly Possessions
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Chaotic Crescendo
achievements.description: Perform a 500-hit combo in the Combat Arena on Very Hard difficulty with Health and Magic set to Normal, using any costume except Robotos, and with Enemy Attack On
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Symphonic Slaughter
achievements.description: Perform a 1,000-hit combo in the Combat Arena on Very Hard difficulty with Health and Magic set to Normal, using any costume except Robotos, and with Enemy Attack On
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Strength and Courage
achievements.description: Beat all Ares Challenges
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Wisdom and Strategy
achievements.description: Beat all Athena Challenges
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: We Accept Donations
achievements.description: Unlock all bonus content at the Temple of Zeus
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: It Was Me All Along, Kratos!
achievements.description: Acquire the Grave Digger's Shovel
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Fortune Carved in Flesh
achievements.description: Reach a total of 999,999 Orbs
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Olympus Will Prevail!
achievements.description: Defeat 10 Keres in the Combat Arena without taking damage on Very Hard difficulty with Health and Magic set to Normal, using the Grave Digger costume, and x4 Keres with Enemy Attack and Respawn On
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: I Bend to No Machine!
achievements.description: Defeat 15 Automatons in the Combat Arena without taking damage on Very Hard difficulty with Health and Magic set to Normal, using the Kratos or God Armor costume, and x2 Automatons with Enemy Attack and Respawn On
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Wretched Beasts!
achievements.description: Defeat 30 Fire Harplings and Harpy Widows in the Combat Arena without taking damage on Very Hard difficulty with Health and Magic set to Normal, using the Ghost of Sparta costume, and x6 Harpies with Enemy Attack and Respawn On
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Hercules Had It Easy!
achievements.description: Defeat 6 Piraeus Lions in the Combat Arena without taking damage on Very Hard difficulty with Health and Magic set to Normal, using the Legionnaire costume, and x2 Lions with Enemy Attack and Respawn On
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Domo Arigato, Mr. Robotos
achievements.description: Perform a 5,310-hit combo in the Combat Arena on Very Hard difficulty with Health and Magic set to Normal, using the Robotos costume, and with Enemy Attack On
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Slaying in Style
achievements.description: Use an alternate costume
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: War Waits for No One
achievements.description: Beat the game in under 3 hours on any difficulty, allowing alternate costumes and previous data
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Defying the Depths
achievements.description: Fight off Scylla without taking damage on God difficulty using only the Kratos costume and no previous data
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Fortunate Son
achievements.description: Defeat Callisto without taking damage aside from the scripted grapple on God difficulty using only the Kratos costume and no previous data
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Look but Don't Touch!
achievements.description: Defeat Erinys without taking damage on God difficulty using only the Kratos costume and no previous data
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: No Hesitation, No Mercy
achievements.description: Defeat Deimos without taking damage on God difficulty using only the Kratos costume and no previous data
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Unbreakable Bond
achievements.description: Defeat Thanatos' first phase without taking damage on God difficulty using only the Kratos costume and no previous data
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Unyielding till the End
achievements.description: Defeat Thanatos' second phase without taking damage on God difficulty using only the Kratos costume and no previous data
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: My Justice Shall Be Flawless!
achievements.description: Defeat Thanatos' final phase without taking damage on God difficulty using only the Kratos costume and no previous data
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: Vengeance Beyond Death
achievements.description: Beat the game on God difficulty
achievements.author: Anic

achievements.title: The Gods Tremble Once Again!
achievements.description: Beat the game on God difficulty without upgrading Weapons, Health, Magic, or Fire, using only the Kratos costume and no previous data
achievements.author: Anic
